title: Ecosystem Foundation
description: Establish the initial Layerz Chapters across 10 top-tier universities globally. Launch the first Builder Program cohort with 100+ active participants. Release the first public research reports from Layerz Labs.
milestones: Launch Layerz Portal and community registration

title: Studio & Services Expansion
description: Open Layerz Studio for early-stage startup branding and design consultancy. Launch AI automation solutions for businesses. Scale community events to 2,000+ members.

title: Layerz Labs & Open Source Core
description: Launch the Layerz open-source SDK and toolkits for developers. Host regional developer bootcamps in Toronto, San Francisco, and London. Roll out the checking in/out membership hub.
milestones: Release Layerz Web3 UI Kit v1.0 (open source)
Establish physical Hubs in SF & Toronto

title: Layerz Ventures & Grants
description: Initialize the Layerz micro-grants program to fund projects coming out of the Builder Program. Launch the Incubator cohort to help projects raise institutional capital.
milestones: Accept 8 startups into Layerz Incubation Q4
Hold global Demo Day with top VC partners
